# jsc_groupedgws (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jsc_groupedgws" "example" {
  name = "my-grouped-gateway"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the grouped gateway

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the grouped gateway
- `recovery_delay_seconds` (Number) Recovery delay in seconds before failing back to primary route
- `route_ids` (List of String) List of route IDs that make up this grouped gateway
- `routing_strategy` (String) The routing strategy (e.g., NEAREST)
- `shared` (Boolean) Whether the grouped gateway is shared
